modules.description: CI Security — action pinning, pwn-request, shell injection, secrets-in-logs, permissions, forbidden soft-fail

modules.description: Shell Script Security — curl|sh, unsafe rm, eval injection, hardcoded secrets, set -e, POSIX compliance

modules.name: sqlMigrations
modules.description: SQL Migration Safety — drop column/table, non-concurrent indexes, NOT NULL without default, blocking constraints, rolling-deploy renames

modules.description: Terraform / IaC Security — public buckets, wildcard ingress, hardcoded secrets, missing encryption, IAM wildcards

modules.name: kubernetes
modules.description: Kubernetes Manifest Security — privileged pods, host namespaces, :latest images, missing limits/probes, dangerous caps

modules.name: promptSafety
modules.description: Prompt / LLM Safety — browser-exposed API keys, unbounded max_tokens, prompt-injection surfaces, deprecated models

modules.name: aiGuardrails
modules.description: AI Guardrails — adversarial LLM testing

modules.name: deadCode
modules.description: Dead Code — unused exports across JS/TS/Python, orphaned files, rotting commented-out blocks

modules.name: secretRotation
modules.description: Secret Rotation — long-lived credentials in git, .env drift, placeholder/real example mismatch

modules.name: webHeaders
modules.description: Web Headers — CSP/HSTS/XFO/CORS misconfig across Next.js, Vercel, Netlify, Express, Fastify, nginx

modules.name: typescriptStrictness
modules.description: TypeScript strictness — tsconfig regressions, @ts-ignore/@ts-nocheck abuse, `any`-leak detection

modules.name: undefinedRef
modules.description: Undefined-reference detector — catches TS2304-shape bugs (name used but not imported / declared) that crash modules at load time

modules.name: flakyTests
modules.description: Flaky Tests — committed .only/.skip, real clock/network/timers, env leaks, self-admitted flakes

modules.name: errorSwallow
modules.description: Error Swallow — empty catch, .catch(noop), callback-err ignored, floating promises, global silent handlers

modules.name: nPlusOne
modules.description: N+1 query detector — database calls inside loops across Prisma, Sequelize, TypeORM, Mongoose, Knex, Drizzle, node-pg, MySQL

modules.name: retryHygiene
modules.description: Retry hygiene — tight retry loops, no backoff, unbounded retry, retry-on-4xx across fetch, axios, got, node-http

modules.name: raceCondition
modules.description: Race-condition / check-then-act detector — fs TOCTOU, get-or-create anti-pattern, lost-update on counters

modules.name: resourceLeak
modules.description: Resource-leak detector — unclosed streams, file handles, intervals, sockets across fs/net/ws/events

modules.name: ssrf
modules.description: SSRF / URL-validation gap detector — user-controlled URLs handed to fetch/axios/got/node-http without validation

modules.name: hardcodedUrl
modules.description: Hardcoded-URL detector — localhost / 127.0.0.1 / RFC1918 / internal TLDs / non-TLS URLs leaking into production code

modules.name: envVars
modules.description: Env-vars — cross-reference process.env / os.environ reads against .env.example and CI env blocks; flag missing and unused keys

modules.name: asyncIteration
modules.description: Async-iteration detector — async callbacks handed to .reduce/.filter/.some/.every/.forEach/.map where Promise semantics silently break the iterator

modules.name: homoglyph
modules.description: Homoglyph / Unicode-lookalike detector — Trojan Source bidi overrides, Cyrillic/Greek letters in Latin identifiers, zero-width chars, and hidden control chars

modules.name: openapiDrift
modules.description: OpenAPI ↔ code drift detector — flags routes defined in code but missing from openapi.yaml, and spec paths with no matching handler

modules.name: prSize
modules.description: PR-size enforcer — blocks unreviewably-large pull requests

modules.name: prQuality
modules.description: PR-quality coach — flags weak commit messages, missing tests, mixed deps+code

modules.name: wpExposedFiles
modules.description: WordPress — finds sensitive files exposed via the public webroot (wp-config.php.bak, debug.log, .git, .env, SQL backups)

modules.name: wpVersionLeak
modules.description: WordPress — finds where the site leaks its core version (readme.html, meta generator, RSS feed, CSS/JS ver=)

modules.name: wpXmlrpcExposed
modules.description: WordPress — checks if /xmlrpc.php is exposed (brute-force amplification + DDoS reflector + auth-bypass surface)

modules.name: wpPluginCveCheck
modules.description: WordPress — detects installed plugins via fingerprinting and flags any with known CVEs

modules.name: wpMalwarePatterns
modules.description: WordPress — scans rendered homepage HTML/JS for known malware signatures (eval(atob), hidden iframes, off-domain redirects, base64 payloads)

modules.name: wpUserEnumerate
modules.description: WordPress — checks if usernames can be enumerated via /?author=1, /wp-json/wp/v2/users, or /author/admin/

modules.name: wpAdminProtection
modules.description: WordPress — checks /wp-admin and /wp-login.php for rate limit / WAF / 2FA / cookie hardening (the layer that decides whether brute-force succeeds)

modules.name: wpPhpVersionEol
modules.description: WordPress — detects the running PHP version and flags it if end-of-life (no security patches)

modules.name: wpThemeAbandonment
modules.description: WordPress — detects the active theme and flags it if abandoned, deprecated, or carrying known CVEs

modules.name: wpBackupValidation
modules.description: WordPress — checks whether a backup plugin is installed AND whether any backup files are publicly exposed (catastrophic data leak)

modules.name: redos
modules.description: ReDoS / catastrophic-regex detector

modules.name: cronExpression
modules.description: Cron-expression validator — catches invalid / impossible / too-frequent cron strings

modules.name: datetimeBug
modules.description: Datetime / timezone bug detector — naive datetimes, 0-vs-1 month, moment-legacy

modules.name: importCycle
modules.description: Import-cycle detector — catches circular dependencies that cause runtime TDZ / undefined-import bugs

modules.name: moneyFloat
modules.description: Money / currency float-safety detector — catches IEEE-754 precision loss on currency-named variables

modules.name: logPii
modules.description: Logging-hygiene / PII-in-logs detector — catches credentials, tokens, and request objects logged in plaintext

modules.name: featureFlag
modules.description: Feature-flag hygiene detector — catches stale flags collapsed into constants and dead-branch conditionals

modules.name: tlsSecurity
modules.description: TLS / cert-validation-bypass detector — catches rejectUnauthorized:false, verify=False, ssl.CERT_NONE, and NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0

modules.name: cookieSecurity
modules.description: Cookie / session-security config detector — catches httpOnly:false, weak session secrets, SESSION_COOKIE_* misconfigs

modules.name: crossFileTaint
modules.description: Cross-file taint analysis — traces user input across module boundaries to dangerous sinks (SQL injection, eval, exec, file-path traversal, DOM injection)

modules.name: deployScriptValidator
modules.description: Deploy Script Validator — health-check URL consistency

modules.name: serviceConsistency
modules.description: Service Consistency — ExecStart / Procfile / PM2 vs package.json start script

modules.name: nativeBundlerGuard
modules.description: Native Bundler Guard — catches native Node addons that cannot be bundled

modules.name: ciParamValidator
modules.description: CI Parameter Validator — validates GitHub Actions with: inputs against action schemas

modules.name: authBypass
modules.description: Auth Bypass Detector — routes missing authentication

modules.name: aiHallucination
modules.description: AI Hallucination Detector — fake imports, invented APIs, non-existent methods

modules.name: claudeCompliance
modules.description: AI-output compliance auditor — mock data in prod, stub bodies, comment noise, any/@ts-ignore density

modules.name: liveSqlInjection
modules.description: Live SQL-injection probe — error-based, boolean, timing payloads against discovered endpoints (Pen Test tier — requires authorization)

modules.name: liveXss
modules.description: Live reflected-XSS probe — reflection detection on discovered endpoints (Pen Test tier — requires authorization)

modules.name: livePathTraversal
modules.description: Live path-traversal probe — /etc/passwd / win.ini read detection (Pen Test tier — requires authorization)

modules.name: liveAuthBypass
modules.description: Live auth-bypass probe — tests if injected headers grant unauthenticated access (Pen Test tier — requires authorization)

modules.name: liveIdor
modules.description: Live IDOR probe — tests if other users' object IDs are reachable without authorization (Pen Test tier — requires authorization)

modules.name: monorepoConstraints
modules.description: Monorepo Constraints — enforces package boundary rules in apps/ packages/ libs/

modules.name: zodSchemaPresence
modules.description: Zod Schema Presence — flags React components without runtime prop validation

modules.name: bundleSize
modules.description: Bundle Size Regression — flags JS bundles exceeding size budgets

modules.name: duplicateCode
modules.description: Duplicate Code Detector — finds copy-pasted blocks that should be extracted into utilities

modules.name: trpcContract
modules.description: tRPC Contract Drift — procedure definitions vs frontend call sites

modules.name: webhookPayload
modules.description: Webhook Payload Validator — catches webhook handlers that use req.body without validation

modules.name: intentVerification
modules.description: Intent Verification — AI checks that the diff matches the commit message / PR description

modules.description: Regression Predictor — AI predicts which files this PR is most likely to break

modules.name: architectureDrift
modules.description: Architecture Drift — AI flags code that violates documented architectural conventions

modules.description: Deploy Readiness Score — aggregate 0-100 deployment confidence score
